name: rolepod
description: Coordinated software-house team for AI coding CLIs — 18 specialist agents, Core 10 phase skills (1 router + 9 phase), 6-phase lifecycle. Pre-commit gates (S1-S5 simplicity / T1-T6 testing / F1-F5 failure-mode) catch bugs before ship. On Claude Code, ships as a marketplace plugin (agents/skills/commands/6 hooks); the always-on CLAUDE.md gate block + rules/ are script-installed by install.sh because the plugin model has no always-on instruction surface. See https://github.com/nuttaruj/rolepod.
